rationale: Pinned review at 38ee213c found the ADR and both SKILL copies accurate to shipped code: Refutation is {slot,round,reason,evidence}; only a latest-round REQUEST_CHANGES is cleared; Approves remains unchanged; leg 9.5 remains layered above the threshold floor; applied refutations are union-persisted as self-contained pending metadata and reconciled from that marker on every pre-close path, including hatches, with fail-closed metadata operations. No discharge design is reintroduced. Section 8 expressly limits durability to applied-refutation audit records, reaffirms the empty-reason footgun, and disclaims general tamper resistance. Hygiene passed: exactly three docs changed, SKILL mirrors match, refutation grep hits both required files, build exited successfully (with a non-fatal Go stat-cache permission warning), panel and complete tests passed, and the bead worktree stayed clean.

findings.detail: ADR/SKILL claims match internal/panel and internal/complete behavior at 38ee213c, including satisfy-from-marker and fail-closed GetMetadata/MergeMetadata.
grep -rin 'refutation_discharged|discharge' over the three pinned docs produced no output.
Section 8 is narrowly scoped to applied-refutation audit durability; it retains the anti-footgun/not-anti-adversary posture and adds no signing, hashing, or broad tamper-resistance claim.

diff -q was silent; changed-file count was 3 and all were docs; grep -n refut hit ADR and plugin SKILL; go build ./... exited 0 after a non-fatal stat-cache permission warning; go test reported ok for internal/panel (cached) and internal/complete (4.886s); post-status was empty.
